add_triton_library(TritonMetalToLLVM
  Allocation.cpp
  TargetInfo.cpp
  TritonGPUToLLVM.cpp

  LINK_LIBS
  TritonAnalysis
  TritonIR
  TritonGPUIR
  TritonGPUToLLVM
  MLIRArithToLLVM
  MLIRControlFlowToLLVM
  MLIRMathToLLVM
  MLIRLLVMDialect
  MLIRUBToLLVM
  MLIRIR
  MLIRPass
  MLIRSCFDialect
  MLIRTransforms
)
